inference.defaultKernelPathRationale: Intentionally inherits Gemma 3 dense-op kernel path. MoE expert FFN dispatch is handled by the MoE pipeline (moe-gpu.js), not by the kernel path. The kernel path governs attention, norms, embed, lm_head, and sampling only. Revisit on drop if Gemma 4 requires different dense-op kernels.
